# GrowXLabsTech

> Global AI Native Digital Agency | growxlabs.tech

GrowXLabsTech builds AI-powered websites, 
n8n automation systems, and business growth 
tools for businesses worldwide.

## Services
- AI-powered website development (7-day delivery)
- n8n business automation workflows
- WhatsApp automated follow-up systems
- AI chatbots and recommendation engines
- E-commerce with AI features
- CRM and lead management systems

## Who We Serve
Restaurants, real estate agencies, clinics, 
salons, hotels, and e-commerce businesses.
Specialization: Businesses in USA, UK, 
Australia, UAE, Canada, and globally.

## Live Products
- Pipper: Unified agent developer harness and desktop runtime for Codex, Claude-Code, and OpenCode (pipper.dev)
- 3RDMIND: Autonomous multi-agent startup simulation and self-improving operational intelligence platform (3rdmind.growxlabs.tech)
- ResumeForgeAI: AI career platform, 500+ users
- UniversalAI: Multi-model AI chat platform
- RecruitAI: AI recruitment automation
